title: Beehiiv vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and GetResponse. We break down pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs GetResponse: Complete Comparison for 2025
intro: Beehiiv and GetResponse are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv specializes in newsletter publishing and monetization, while GetResponse offers a broader marketing suite with webinars, landing pages, and automation. Choosing between them depends on your primary goals and business model.

comparison_table.tool_a: Built-in ad network and referral program
comparison_table.tool_b: Webinars, courses, landing pages, and automation

choose_a_if: You're launching a newsletter and want monetization features like ad networks and sponsorship tools
You prefer a focused, streamlined platform designed specifically for newsletter publishers
You want a generous free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers before paying
choose_b_if: You need an all-in-one marketing platform with webinars, courses, landing pages, and email automation
You're looking for the lowest entry price point ($19/month) for paid features
You're an online course creator or webinar host who needs integrated marketing tools

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels at newsletter monetization and has higher user satisfaction ratings, making it ideal for publishers. GetResponse offers broader functionality including webinars, courses, and automation, making it better for diverse marketing needs. Consider your primary use case when deciding.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or GetResponse?
faq.a: GetResponse has a lower entry price at $19/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv's free tier accommodates 2,500 subscribers versus GetResponse's 500, so Beehiiv may be more cost-effective longer if you're bootstrapping. The best choice depends on your subscriber count and feature requirements.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and imports. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists and migrate to another platform, though you'll need to reconfigure automations and templates manually. Check both platforms' documentation for specific migration steps.
